backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that includes MixinStorage for blob storage and defines SongMetadata type with fields for song information (id, title, artist, album, mood, genre, audioUrl, audioFileId, duration, createdAt).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features (Home, Artists, Search, Dashboard, Profile pages) with their associated files, components, test IDs, and high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the MusicScope application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Home, Artists, Search, Dashboard, Profile) wrapped in PlayerProvider and Layout components.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout component with sticky header containing MusicScope branding and navigation menu, main content area, persistent MusicPlayer at bottom, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx: Fixed bottom music player component with playback controls (play/pause, skip, volume), progress bar with time display, and current song information display.
frontend/src/components/SongCard.tsx: Reusable song card component displaying album art, title, artist, mood/genre badges, duration, with hover effects and click-to-play functionality.
frontend/src/contexts/PlayerContext.tsx: React context provider for music player state and controls, managing current song, playback status, volume, progress, queue, and audio element with play/pause/seek/queue operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor with authentication, automatically recreating the actor when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts: Custom React hook that debounces a value by delaying updates until after a specified delay period (default 500ms).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks providing mock data for songs, user profiles, and listening history with simulated network delays for development/demonstration purposes.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Artists.tsx: Artists page component that displays songs grouped by artist and album with expandable/collapsible sections, play buttons, and song metadata including duration and mood badges.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying listening history visualizations with bar charts, line charts, and pie charts for songs played over time, genre distribution, and mood distribution, filterable by day/week/month/year time periods.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that displays a grid of all songs using SongCard components with loading state, allowing users to browse and play songs from the main library.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Profile page showing user statistics (liked songs, downloaded songs, total library), editable profile information, and lists of liked/downloaded songs with playback functionality, requiring Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Search.tsx: Search page with real-time filtering of songs by title, artist, album, genre, or mood using debounced input, displaying results in SongCard components with empty state handling.
frontend/src/types.ts: TypeScript type definitions for SongMetadata, UserProfile, and ListeningHistoryData interfaces used throughout the application.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with chart colors, sidebar colors, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting MusicScope app architecture, features including mood-based prediction, five-page navigation, persistent player, visualization dashboard, and image requirements for UI assets.
